differentials.name: Interrupted aortic arch supply of lower extremity via PDA
differentials.raw: Interrupted aortic arch supply of lower extremity via PDA

context: =  compensatory effect of PDA (= decreasing shunt volume) in: PDA acts as escape valve shunting blood to descending aorta Nonbeneficial PDA in L-to-R shunts (VSD, aortopulmonic window) a PDA increases shunt volume
